import re

def slugify(text):
    if not text:
        return ""
    
    # Lowercase
    text = text.lower()
    
    # Remove punctuation (keep only alphanumeric, whitespace, underscore)
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', '', text)
    
    # Replace runs of whitespace and underscores with single hyphen
    text = re.sub(r'[\s_]+', '-', text)
    
    # Trim hyphens from start and end
    text = text.strip('-')
    
    return text
